{{Quote|The ''Nautical Star'' is an exquisite example of Mon Calamari craftsbeingship. As you may know, each Mon Calamari ship is a unique work of art. This particular freighter is no exception|[[Fiz Cor'gril]] on the ''Nautical Star''|<ref name="AJ9" />}}
The '''''Nautical Star''''' was a 30-meter-long [[Mon Calamari light freighter]].

==Characteristics==
It had controls for a number of non-[[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. It could handle up to 85 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and had a number of redundant systems, typical in Mon Calamari engineering.

The ''Nautical Star'' was able to operate in the vacuum of space, in atmosphere, and underwater. It was lightly armed with a pair of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

{{Ship-stub}}
